coachAM: Your "lock in young" mentality is collapsing your physical and mental foundations, evident in the fragmented morning entries, the glaring absence of evening reflection, and the abysmal sleep and training compliance; you're chasing external validation and immediate wins (Instagram, pitches, salesforce interviews) at the expense of the disciplined internal environment required for sustained elite performance. This relentless external focus and lack of internal accountability—manifested by missing the critical PM review and allowing "loop scrolling" to erode your focus—is the root cause, preventing the self-awareness and course correction essential for compounding growth and ultimately derailing your long-term trajectory. Tonight, before anything else, complete a full PM reflection, specifically identifying what derailed your Sleep Protocol and Training, and outline one specific adjustment for tomorrow.
